proposal.working_title: How to Choose an AI Consulting Agency That Ships Working Systems, Not Slide Decks
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AI consulting agency content is written by the strategy giants and optimizes for enterprise procurement. This is the operator's evaluation framework instead: score an agency on shipped outcomes, payback timeline, and system ownership transfer rather than brand name and bench size.
outline_bullets: What an AI consulting agency actually delivers, and the 3 engagement models that hide very different risk
The 7-point scorecard for vetting an agency: payback math, system ownership, and proof of shipped work
Red flags that signal slide-deck consulting, plus what a real 90-day done-for-you engagement looks like
